name: Frontline Education K-12 HR & Administration API
what_it_does: Frontline Education REST API for K-12 school district HR, administration, and professional development platform. Enables AI agents to manage educator absence and substitute placement workflow automation via Aesop (Frontline Absence & Time), handle employee recruitment, applicant tracking, and onboarding workflow for school district HR, access professional development tracking and certification management data for educator compliance, retrieve payroll and benefits administration data for district employee management, handle educator performance evaluation workflow data for teacher effectiveness programs, access budget and financial management data for school district fiscal operations, retrieve special education IEP workflow and compliance tracking data, manage facilities scheduling and resource booking for school operational logistics, handle student information system integration data for enrollment and demographic analytics, and integrate K-12 administrative data with SIS, state reporting, and district ERP systems.
use_cases: Automating substitute placement from absence management agents
Tracking educator certifications from HR compliance agents
Managing teacher recruitment from district talent acquisition agents
Processing professional development from educator growth agents
not_for: Higher education institutions without K-12 district administration needs
Private schools without public district compliance requirements
Non-education HR without K-12-specific substitute and certification workflows
best_when: A K-12 public school district using Frontline Education wants AI agents to automate substitute teacher placement, educator absence management, HR compliance tracking, certification monitoring, and professional development workflow across district operations.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: Frontline manages educator certification and employment records — automated adverse employment actions based on Frontline data without HR and legal review violates teacher contract and collective bargaining agreement (CBA) terms. Substitute placement automation must comply with union seniority lists and CBA requirements. IEP workflow data is FERPA-protected student education records; automated IEP processing requires special education compliance review.

auth.notes: Frontline Education uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-district credentials. Webhooks for absence and HR events. REST API with JSON. Wayne, Pennsylvania HQ. Part of Roper Technologies portfolio. Aesop is the legacy brand name (now Frontline Absence & Time). 12,000+ school districts. ~100M educator K-12 absences managed annually. Competes with Absence Management (SmartFindExpress) for K-12 substitute management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — district subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per module and district employee count
pricing.notes: Wayne, Pennsylvania. Part of Roper Technologies. 12,000+ district customers. Frontline Absence & Time (Aesop), Frontline Recruiting & Hiring, Frontline Professional Growth, Frontline HRMS, and Frontline Special Education modules. Dominant in K-12 substitute management (Aesop brand). Competes with SmartFindExpress (Kelly Education) for substitute management and TalentEd for K-12 HR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; district size dependent

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Teacher contract and CBA rules govern employment actions; automated adverse employment actions or shift changes without HR and legal review violate collective bargaining agreements
Substitute seniority list compliance — union districts have CBA rules governing substitute call-out order and preference; automated substitute placement must respect seniority and CBA terms
FERPA student data protection — special education and student data in Frontline is FERPA-protected; automated data sharing without proper FERPA consent and purpose creates student privacy violations
State certification compliance — educator certification requirements vary by state; automated certification compliance tracking must apply correct state-specific certification requirements

IEP legal obligations — IEP workflow has strict IDEA (Individuals with Disabilities Education Act) procedural requirements; automated IEP actions without special education coordinator review creates legal compliance risk
School district fiscal year — district budget and HR data follows school fiscal year (July-June); automated financial processing must handle school-year date boundaries
agent_readiness.security_notes: K-12 HR and administration. SOC2, FERPA, COPPA. OAuth2/API key. US. Educator employment and student education record data.

security_score_components.security_notes: K-12 education HR. SOC2, FERPA, COPPA. OAuth2. US. Educator employment and student data.
